rationale: Refactoring test to use Moq instead of local IClusterInternal implementation; internal test cleanup.
Windows socket timing bug in sync code; platform-specific implementation issue, no spec rule violated.
BSON allows duplicate field names; driver produces them but behavior is explicitly unspecified by BSON spec.
Internal refactor of IOperationExecutor to use operation context; no driver behavior change.
Big Endian support addition to BinaryVectorReader/Writer; platform compatibility improvement, not spec nonconformance.
FindOneAndUpdate upsert sets wrong discriminator value; C#-specific serialization/discriminator convention bug, no cross-driver spec rule.
Discriminator conventions fail with generic types due to using Name vs FullName; C#-specific serialization implementation bug.
Fix deserialization using BitConverter on Big Endian systems; platform portability fix, not spec nonconformance.
Remove unused IChannel.Query methods; internal API cleanup with no behavior change.
Race condition in ExclusiveConnectionPool causing ArgumentOutOfRangeException; implementation concurrency bug, not spec violation.
Refactor IConnection.SendMessages from IEnumerable to single message; internal API refactor.
Test fix for Big Endian systems using platform-endian BitConverter; test infrastructure fix, not driver bug.
Test assertions use platform-endian BitConverter on Big Endian; test infrastructure fix, not driver behavior issue.
Adding CODEOWNERS file to analyzer repo; repository administration, not driver behavior.
Extend IAsyncCursor to support IAsyncEnumerable; C#-specific API enhancement, no spec area.
Adding CODEOWNERS to aspnetcore-odata repo; repository administration.
Reduce floating point precision in extended JSON tests; child of DRIVERS-792, test infrastructure update for spec tests.
Add SDAM spec test for incompatible server becoming compatible; child of DRIVERS-923, test infrastructure update.
Add test assertion to SRV+directConnection test; child of DRIVERS-1288, spec test infrastructure update.
Add test coverage for maxStalenessSeconds with no viable servers; child of DRIVERS-1291, spec test infrastructure update.
Remove xtrace usage from shell scripts; CI/build script cleanup, split from DRIVERS-1596.
Bug in LINQ3 KeyValuePair Key selection with camelCase convention; internal LINQ translation bug.
Thread safety issue in BsonSerializer.IsTypeDiscriminated; concurrency bug in C#-specific serialization implementation.
Eliminate unnecessary killCursors when batchSize==limit; split from DRIVERS-1447, spec test/behavior rollout.
Fix UnobservedTaskException on socket timeout; implementation-level async exception handling bug.
Use dotnet 9.0 SDK for EFCore tests; CI/build toolchain update.
Add ObjectId key support to Semantic Kernel VectorData integration; not a MongoDB driver spec area.
Add median and percentile accumulators to LINQ; new feature request, not a spec nonconformance.
Client.BulkWrite fails with complex Id type; BSON type mapping limitation, not a deviation from bulk write spec rule.
PushEach sort not applied for primitive arrays; LINQ builder bug in update serialization, no specific spec rule violated.
Fix disposal of shared OperationContext in transaction; internal resource management bug, not spec nonconformance.
Support auto encryption in unified test runner; split from DRIVERS-3106, unified test infrastructure update.
Fix duplicate test ID warning in RangeExplicitEncryptionTest; test definition bug, not driver behavior.
AtlasSearch test not passing client settings to MongoClient; test code bug, not driver behavior.
Remove allocation in BsonClassMap.GetDiscriminatorConvention; performance optimization, no behavior change.
Add optin setting for MinPoolSize population in unified test runner; split from DRIVERS-3282, test infrastructure update.
Increase heartbeat interval when debugger is attached; developer ergonomics improvement, not spec related.
Remove BinaryConnection.DropBox dead code after dropping old server support; internal cleanup.
Skip Docker-dependent EFCore tests on Windows; CI configuration fix.
Average over empty collection of nullable types throws; LINQ translation bug, not a spec nonconformance.
Exclude netstandard duplicate test tasks on ARM; CI configuration improvement.
Remove GetBitArray allocations in BsonClassMapSerializer; performance optimization, no behavior change.
Ensure KeyValuePairSerializer used consistently; internal serialization refactor, C#-specific consistency fix.
Ensure KeyValuePairSerializer used consistently; internal serialization refactor, C#-specific consistency fix.
Avoid RentedBuffer boxing in DisposableSegment; internal performance optimization.
Update doc comments for IBsonIdProvider.GetDocumentId; documentation fix for C#-specific API.
TimeOnly serializer breaks backward compatibility with old documents; serialization compatibility issue, no cross-driver spec.
Resync bson-corpus array.json to fix duplicate test names; child of DRIVERS-732, spec test file sync.
Install only required SDK/runtimes on EG test variants; CI build optimization.
Driver fails in Unity since v3.2.0 with socket address family exception; platform compatibility regression, not spec nonconformance.
